summary.para: Component templates are building blocks for constructing index templates that specify index mappings, settings, and aliases.
Period to wait for a connection to the master node. If no response is received before the timeout expires, the request fails and returns an error.
Comma-separated list or wildcard expression of component template names used to limit the request.
Period to wait for a response. If no response is received before the timeout expires, the request fails and returns an error.
